title: Ubiquiti UX
description: UniFi Express powerful and compact UniFi Cloud Gateway and WiFi 6 acess point. There is a WAN port and one LAN port to expand the network. UniFi has also equipped this model with an LCM display to show various information such as download and or upload speeds. It also supports VPN which can be easily set up via the web interface. The device is powered by USB-C Supporting WiFi 6 LAN and WAN port for network connection LCM display to show basic information Integrated UniFi Network application for up to 4 managed devices Device USB-C with adapter for powering RJ45 cabel
specsSearch: Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11ax Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2402 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power type USB-C Max. power consumption [W] 10 Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 45 Width [mm] 98 Height [mm] 28 Depth [mm] 98
